initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    sp.businessentityid,
    strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate) AS year,
    SUM(soh.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    sp.salesquota AS quota,
    SUM(soh.totaldue) - sp.salesquota AS difference
FROM 
    salesperson sp
JOIN 
    salesorderheader soh ON sp.businessentityid = soh.salespersonid
GROUP BY 
    sp.businessentityid, strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate), sp.salesquota
ORDER BY 
    sp.businessentityid ASC, year ASC;

SELECT 
    sp.businessentityid,
    strftime('%Y', so.orderdate) AS year,
    SUM(so.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    sp.salesquota,
    SUM(so.totaldue) - sp.salesquota AS difference
FROM salesperson sp
JOIN salesorderheader so ON sp.businessentityid = so.salespersonid
GROUP BY sp.businessentityid, strftime('%Y', so.orderdate), sp.salesquota
ORDER BY sp.businessentityid ASC, year ASC;

SELECT 
    sp.businessentityid,
    strftime('%Y', so.orderdate) AS year,
    SUM(so.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    sp.salesquota,
    SUM(so.totaldue) - sp.salesquota AS sales_vs_quota_diff
FROM 
    salesperson sp
JOIN 
    salesorderheader so ON sp.businessentityid = so.salespersonid
GROUP BY 
    sp.businessentityid,
    strftime('%Y', so.orderdate),
    sp.salesquota
ORDER BY 
    sp.businessentityid ASC,
    year ASC;

SELECT 
    sp.businessentityid,
    strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate) AS year,
    SUM(soh.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    sp.salesquota,
    SUM(soh.totaldue) - sp.salesquota AS sales_vs_quota_diff
FROM salesperson sp
JOIN salesorderheader soh ON sp.businessentityid = soh.salespersonid
GROUP BY sp.businessentityid, strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate), sp.salesquota
ORDER BY sp.businessentityid ASC, year ASC;

SELECT 
    sp.businessentityid,
    strftime('%Y', so.orderdate) AS year,
    SUM(so.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    sp.salesquota,
    SUM(so.totaldue) - sp.salesquota AS sales_vs_quota_diff
FROM salesperson sp
JOIN salesorderheader so ON sp.businessentityid = so.salespersonid
GROUP BY sp.businessentityid, strftime('%Y', so.orderdate), sp.salesquota
ORDER BY sp.businessentityid ASC, year ASC;
